'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 19''' was the nineteenth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[May 8]], [[2002]]. The issue was authored by [[Iain Lowson]] and [[Jim Swallow]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*[[Jedi training/Legends|Jedi Training]]
*[[Watto/Legends|Watto]]
*[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]
*[[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]
*[[MSE-6 series repair droid/Legends|MSE-6 'Mouse Droid']]
*[[Repulsorlift/Legends|Repulsorlift Engines]]
*[[Plug-F Mammoth Split-X engine/Legends|Sebulba's Podracer]]
*[[Sublight engine/Legends|Starship Drive Systems]]
